problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
mechanism: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering
hypothesis: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Electrospun. Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
